question_text: Which circuit symbol represents a switch?

options.label: A
options.text: A circle with two terminals and a movable arm that can open or close the circuit

options.label: B
options.text: A coil of wire wrapped around an iron core

options.label: D
options.text: A circle with an X through it

correct_answer: A) A circle with two terminals and a movable arm that can open or close the circuit
explanation: The switch symbol shows a pivot point with a movable arm that can make or break contact with the circuit. When the arm touches the contact point, the switch is closed and current flows; when it does not, the switch is open and current is blocked.
